title: Functional characterization of 42 CK2alpha de novo variants associated with Okur-Chung neurodevelopmental syndrome
abstract_snippet: Characterization of 42 CK2alpha (CSNK2A1) variants linked to Okur-Chung NDD syndrome. 13 had no detectable enzymatic activity.
summary: Functional characterization of 42 de novo CSNK2A1 variants in Okur-Chung NDD syndrome (an ASD-linked condition). 13/42 had zero activity, 12 had <10% WT activity. Variants with normal kinase activity suggest other parameters beyond enzymatic function contribute to NDD.
